title: 班门弄斧
meaning: 比喻在行家面前卖弄本领，不自量力。

scenes.title: 鲁班的大名
scenes.description: The boy stands in a sunny village square, looking up at a large, famous statue of Lu Ban (the master carpenter). People around are admiring the statue. The boy looks curious and confident.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., A cute Chinese boy in blue Hanfu standing in a sunny village square, looking up at a large stone statue of an ancient wise carpenter named Lu Ban. Villagers are gathering around admiring it. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Wide angle shot, establishing the setting and the boy's perspective looking up at the statue., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: 村里有个小男孩，叫小乐。他听说鲁班爷爷是天下第一巧匠，心里痒痒的，也想露一手。
scenes.compositionHint: Wide angle shot, establishing the setting and the boy's perspective looking up at the statue.

scenes.title: 自告奋勇
scenes.description: Little Bo holds his small wooden axe proudly in front of a group of villagers. He points towards Lu Ban's workshop. He looks very confident and eager to show off.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., Cute Chinese boy in blue Hanfu holding a small wooden axe proudly, pointing towards a wooden workshop. A group of villagers looks on with curiosity. The boy has a confident smile. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Medium shot, focusing on the boy's expression and gesture, with villagers in the background., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: 小乐拿起他的小木斧，大声说：‘我也能砍木头！我要去鲁班家门口显摆显摆！’大家听了都摇摇头。
scenes.compositionHint: Medium shot, focusing on the boy's expression and gesture, with villagers in the background.

scenes.title: 来到门前
scenes.description: The boy stands outside a grand, intricate wooden gate made of fine craftsmanship. The gate is huge compared to him. He looks small but determined, holding his axe ready to strike.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., Small cute Chinese boy in blue Hanfu standing before a massive, intricately carved wooden gate. The gate represents high-level carpentry. The boy holds a small wooden axe, looking tiny but determined. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Low angle shot to emphasize the size of the gate and the smallness of the boy., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: 小乐来到了鲁班爷爷的家门口。那扇门精雕细刻，漂亮极了。小乐心想：‘这么难的事，我一定能行！’
scenes.compositionHint: Low angle shot to emphasize the size of the gate and the smallness of the boy.

scenes.title: 挥斧炫耀
scenes.description: The boy swings his small wooden axe at a simple piece of wood placed near the gate. Wood chips fly everywhere. He looks focused but clumsy compared to the master craftsmanship nearby.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., Cute Chinese boy in blue Hanfu swinging a small wooden axe at a log. Wood chips are flying. He looks focused but slightly clumsy. In the background, hints of master-level carpentry work are visible. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Action shot, capturing the moment of the swing, dynamic motion blur on the axe., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: ‘嘿！看我的！’小乐用力挥起斧头，叮叮当当敲了起来。他觉得自已真了不起，大家都该夸他。
scenes.compositionHint: Action shot, capturing the moment of the swing, dynamic motion blur on the axe.

scenes.title: 鲁班现身
scenes.description: Lu Ban, an old wise man with a beard and tools, steps out of the workshop. He smiles gently at the boy. The boy stops, looking surprised and a bit ashamed.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., Old wise Chinese man with a beard and carpenter tools stepping out of a workshop door. He smiles gently at the cute boy in blue Hanfu who is holding an axe. The boy looks surprised and slightly ashamed. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the boy, showing Lu Ban's approach and reaction., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: 这时，门开了。一位白发老爷爷走了出来，笑眯眯地看着小乐。原来，他就是鲁班爷爷！
scenes.compositionHint: Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the boy, showing Lu Ban's approach and reaction.

scenes.title: 羞愧低头
scenes.description: The boy looks down at his feet, blushing. He holds the axe loosely. Lu Ban pats his shoulder kindly. The contrast between the boy's amateur attempt and the master's presence is clear.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., Cute Chinese boy in blue Hanfu looking down at his feet, blushing, holding the axe loosely. The old carpenter, Lu Ban, pats his shoulder kindly. The boy looks ashamed but learning. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Close-up shot, focusing on the emotional expressions of both characters., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: 小乐脸红了，低下头。他知道，自己在真正的专家面前卖弄本事，真是太不自量啦。
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up shot, focusing on the emotional expressions of both characters.

scenes.title: 虚心请教
scenes.description: The boy sits on a stool next to Lu Ban, watching intently as Lu Ban uses a plane on wood. The boy holds his axe away, listening respectfully.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced Chinese boy aged 6, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in bright blue with white trim, black hair tied in two buns, expressive eyes, holding a small wooden axe, Pixar-style 3D render, soft lighting, high detail., Cute Chinese boy in blue Hanfu sitting on a small stool next to old carpenter Lu Ban. Lu Ban is using a wood plane skillfully. The boy watches intently, holding his axe aside respectfully. Pixar-style 3D render, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, whimsical atmosphere, consistent character design., Side view medium shot, showing the interaction and the act of teaching/learning., Children's picture book illustration style, soft pastel colors, warm lighting, gentle watercolor textures blended with 3D modeling, whimsical and safe atmosphere, no sharp edges, consistent character design across all scenes.
scenes.narration: 鲁班爷爷没有生气，反而教他怎么拿斧头，怎么让木头变光滑。小乐学会了谦虚，也学到了真本领。
scenes.compositionHint: Side view medium shot, showing the interaction and the act of teaching/learning.
